Feast: Elevation of the Precious and Life-Giving Cross
Text: Exalt the Lord our God, and worship at the footstool of his feet; for he is holy. Save us, O Son of God, who were crucified in the flesh. We sing to you, Alleluia.

Feast: Afterfeast of the Elevation of the Cross
Text: Exalt the Lord our God, and worship at the footstool of his feet; for he is holy. Save us, O Son of God, who were crucified in the flesh. We sing to you, Alleluia.
